scope: Latest catalyst summaries are editorial/model workflow context, not investment advice.

crude_oil.headline: Oil Jumps on Middle East Risk, but the Model Stack Splits the Trade
crude_oil.summary: Crude oil rose 2.22% to $94.40 as Middle East risk and physical tightness headlines returned, but CommodityNode's refreshed Chronos-2 and TimesFM stack is split across the 90-day path.
crude_oil.model_reaction: Crude Oil: mixed forecast path with Add Continuation RL action; research workflow signal, not investment advice.

cotton.headline: Cotton Breaks to a Fresh High as Textile Risk Reprices
cotton.summary: Cotton rose 3.28% to $79.32, pushing above its prior 52-week high as textile and yarn supply-chain headlines meet a moderately bullish CommodityNode forecast stack.
cotton.model_reaction: Cotton: bullish forecast path with Hold / Wait RL action; research workflow signal, not investment advice.

natural_gas.headline: Natural Gas Breaks Lower Even as the Bullish Stack Still Holds
natural_gas.summary: Natural gas fell 13.47% to $2.678/MMBtu, but CommodityNode's refreshed forecast stack still points higher over 30 and 90 days, keeping the setup decisively tension-filled rather than cleanly bearish.
natural_gas.model_reaction: Natural Gas: mixed forecast path with Add Continuation RL action; research workflow signal, not investment advice.

cocoa.headline: Cocoa Jumps as Ivory Coast Pricing Tension Meets a Split Forecast Stack
cocoa.summary: Cocoa rose 5.68% to 3367 as Ivory Coast pricing headlines tightened the narrative again, but CommodityNode's refreshed model stack is still sharply split on whether this is a rebound or the start of a stronger reset.
cocoa.model_reaction: Cocoa: bearish forecast path with Hold / Wait RL action; research workflow signal, not investment advice.

lithium.headline: Lithium Selloff Tests the Bullish Stack as Albemarle Drops 8.29%
lithium.summary: Lithium proxy ALB fell 8.29% to 197.75, but CommodityNode's refreshed consensus still points above spot over 30 to 90 days, keeping the medium-term recovery thesis alive under stress.
lithium.model_reaction: Lithium (ALB): mixed forecast path with Hold / Wait RL action; research workflow signal, not investment advice.

coffee.headline: Coffee Premium Unwind Extends as Supply Relief Headlines Keep Hitting the Tape
coffee.summary: Coffee fell another 8.15% to 272.3 cents/lb, and the refreshed CommodityNode forecast stack still points lower as supply-relief headlines and a firmer dollar keep pressuring the premium.
coffee.model_reaction: Coffee: bearish forecast path with Hold / Wait RL action; research workflow signal, not investment advice.

orange_juice.headline: Orange Juice Extends Higher as the Forecast Stack Finally Starts Leaning With the Tape
orange_juice.summary: Orange juice rose another 6.79% to 188.05, and CommodityNode's refreshed forecast stack is now modestly bullish across both major models, suggesting the tape has stronger follow-through than it did earlier in the week.
orange_juice.model_reaction: Orange Juice: bearish forecast path with Hold / Wait RL action; research workflow signal, not investment advice.

silver.headline: Silver Rips Higher, but the Model Split Warns That Momentum Is Not the Whole Story
silver.summary: Silver rose 3.68% to 81.5, but CommodityNode's refreshed forecast stack is split, with Chronos-2 still above spot at 90 days while TimesFM points materially lower.
silver.model_reaction: Silver: bearish forecast path with Hold / Wait RL action; research workflow signal, not investment advice.
